requirements.evidence: Host validation passed `LSContentCardTests.test_default_render_uses_surface_card_tokens` on commit `c02124017eced04d4adf1612938fc001b3d10ad8`; the test hosts a real card and verifies rendered layer geometry plus `LSCard`/`LSText` composition in `ios/LaneShadowTests/Molecules/LSContentCardTests.swift`.

Host validation passed `LSContentCardTests.test_action_footer_slot_renders_below_metadata`; the test compares hosted with-actions and without-actions renders and verifies divider/footer ordering below metadata without residual footer gap.

Host validation passed `LSListRowTests.test_layout_tokens_and_minimum_touch_target`; the test verifies rendered row geometry, 44pt minimum surface height, leading-to-title spacing, subtitle placement, and trailing icon ordering.

Host validation passed `LSListRowTests.test_ontap_fires_once_and_no_highlight_without_handler`; `LSListRow.swift` now exposes a real `UIControl` through `LSListRowInteractionSurface`, and the test fires `.touchUpInside` through that public surface while confirming the static row has no interactive control ancestor.

Host grep gate returned zero matches for `Color(red:)`, `Color(hex:)`, `Font.system`, and deprecated `foregroundColor(` in `ios/LaneShadow/Views/Molecules/LSContentCard.swift` and `ios/LaneShadow/Views/Molecules/LSListRow.swift`.

Host validation passed `LSContentCardTests.test_all_ten_stories_registered`; the committed worktree still registers 10 molecule stories and the screenshot artifact at `.kb-run/tasks/UC-MOL-01-ios/iterations/003/uc-mol-01-ios-remediation-iteration-003.png` shows a valid sandbox molecule surface.

summary: Review cycle 3 is approved. The remediation converts AC-1 through AC-4 to real hosted public-surface verification, provides a valid sandbox screenshot artifact, and passes the exact contract selector set plus the full iOS test scheme.
